recommendations.title: Up to His Ears
recommendations.overview: A millionaire realizes he really wants to live after he has hired an assassin to kill him.

recommendations.title: The Magnificent One
recommendations.overview: A writer of pulpy book series in which he's the hero and his beautiful English roommate is the love interest attempts to finish his new book in time at the publisher's demand.

recommendations.title: That Man from Rio

recommendations.title: Cartouche

recommendations.title: Incorrigible
recommendations.overview: Victor Vautier is incorrigible: he's in constant motion, working several cons at once, using different names and changing disguises. He's charming and outrageous, incapable of uttering a sentence that isn't embellished or an outright lie. His life go

recommendations.title: Cria!
recommendations.overview: Ana, an eight-year-old girl living in Madrid with her grandmother and two sisters, mourns the death of her mother.

recommendations.title: We Will Go
recommendations.overview: An unexpected road trip brings a dysfunctional family together for one last journey with their elder, sparking moments of connection, joy, and reconciliation.

recommendations.title: Army of Shadows

recommendations.title: The Grand Highway
